column3: RCP's Bleach is a versatile, industrial-strength solution used to whiten fabrics, brighten surfaces, and lift away tough stains in both commercial and everyday cleaning applications. Ideal for removing color from fabric or fiber and tackling stubborn marks, it is a dependable staple for detail shops, facilities, and households alike. column3:
WEATHER SHIELD

 

DESCRIPTION:


WEATHER SHIELD is an advanced, highly concentrated spray wax and drying aid designed to deliver a flawless, high-gloss finish while protecting vehicle surfaces. It enhances shine, promotes superior water beading, and features powerful de-foaming properties that ensure a clean, spot-free rinse every time.

 

Formulated specifically for automated systems like wash tunnels and touch-free car washes, WEATHER SHIELD helps vehicles dry faster, look glossier, and stay protected longer.

 

KEY BENEFITS:

  • Superior Water Beading: Repels water instantly for a spotless finish.

  • Deep Surface Shine: Leaves a rich, polished look after every wash.

  • Advanced De-Foaming Formula: Prevents soap buildup during final rinse.

  • Quick-Drying Action: Shortens dry times and boosts efficiency.

  • Highly Concentrated: Economical dilution for maximum performance.

 

WHERE TO USE:

  • Automatic Conveyor (Foamers): Apply through drying agent.

  • Rinse Arch Automatic (Foamers): Use during the spray wax cycle.

  • Touch-Free IBAs: Bay or arch-mounted applications.

 

DILUTION RATIO:
Mix at a final dilution rate of 1:100–200 parts water to 1 part product.

column3:
React Ceramic Car Wash Soap:

 

REACT is a specially formulated wash that contains SiO₂, the same ingredient used in ceramic coatings, to help revitalize and maintain your existing protection simply through washing. Designed as the perfect aftercare soap, REACT enhances durability, gloss, and water beading of any ceramic coating, sealant, or wax. Just 4–6 oz of this hyper-foaming formula is all you need to refresh your finish while extending the life of your coating.

 

REACT is also engineered to resist cross-contamination, helping prevent your coating from drying prematurely. Its advanced formula maximizes longevity and protection, leaving your vehicle with a long-lasting, high-gloss shine that looks freshly detailed every time.

 

  • Contains SiO₂, the main ingredient in ceramic coatings, to revitalize your existing protection

  • Perfect aftercare soap for ceramic coatings, sealants, and waxes

  • Enhances durability, gloss, and water beading

  • Hyper-foaming formula – only 4–6 oz needed per wash

  • Resists cross-contamination to prevent premature drying

  • Maximizes longevity and protection of coatings

  • Leaves a long-lasting, high-gloss, freshly detailed finish

Tidal Wave is a highly concentrated laundry detergent formulated to deliver a deep, thorough clean for all types of fabrics. Its advanced formula tackles tough stains, removes embedded dirt and grime, and helps maintain vibrant colors while keeping whites bright.

 

Designed for use in all washing machines, including high-efficiency (HE) models, Tidal Wave penetrates fabrics to lift stubborn residues without harsh chemicals, leaving clothes soft, fresh, and clean. Infused with a long-lasting Gain-inspired fragrance, it keeps your laundry smelling great while providing reliable performance wash after wash. Perfect for everyday laundry or tackling heavily soiled items, Tidal Wave combines powerful cleaning with gentle care to protect your fabrics and enhance their longevity.

 

  • Highly concentrated formula for powerful cleaning with less product
  • Infused with Gain fragrance for a fresh, long-lasting scent
  • Effectively removes tough stains, dirt, and grime from laundry
  • Helps maintain vibrant colors and brighten whites for a professional finish
  • Suitable for all types of fabrics and washing machines
  • Safe for use in commercial and industrial laundry settings

Its powerful blend of enzymes and surfactants breaks down protein-based stains on contact while lifting embedded dirt from carpet and upholstery fibers.

 

Ideal for detail shops, high-volume reconditioning centers, or everyday use, PROTEIN STAIN REMOVER not only eliminates stains quickly and effectively but also leaves behind a protective, soil-resistant barrier to help prevent re-soiling and make future cleanups easier. Safe for use on most fabrics and interior surfaces, it restores your vehicle’s interior to a clean, fresh, like-new condition with minimal effort.

 

  • Breaks down organic protein-based stains

  • Safe for use on carpet, upholstery, and fabric interiors

  • Leaves behind a soil-resistant barrier

  • Ideal for auto detailing and reconditioning professionals
